home_overview_location_value: National Highway 1D, Ghenh Rang, Quy Nhon
home_infrastructure_description: The Hera Resort Quy Nhon possesses a convenient connectivity location situated right on Highway 1D, adjacent to the poetic Ghenh Rang coastline. From the project, it only takes about 10 minutes (approximately 10km) to reach Quy Nhon city center and 35-40 minutes to connect to Phu Cat Airport, ensuring quick access for both domestic and international tourists. Especially, the surrounding area also converges many beautiful beaches such as Quy Hoa, Bai Xep, Bai Rạng, creating a diverse tourism ecosystem and increasing resort value for the entire area.
home_int_dsc_intro_1: The Hera Resort is not just a resort destination, but a place where people find their inner balance. Here, nature is not only present outside the window, but breathes with every rhythm of life. The majesty of the mountains brings a sense of protection. The vastness of the sea opens up freedom and recovery.
home_int_dsc_intro_2: At the intersection of sea and mountains, The Hera Resort presents itself as a living spirit in every architectural curve, every flower branch, every green patch through white rocks, every silence of the day's end light. The flow of majestic yet poetic nature is delicately guided, so that every moment here is perfectly preserved.
home_int_dsc_investor: Sunshine Group with a spearhead strategy in real estate business investment, has been focusing on developing more than 20 luxury projects across the country.
home_int_dsc_manager: Professional management support according to international standards, ensuring asset value and high-class service experience for residents and tourists.
home_hl_ttl_main: RESORT AND ENJOYMENT AT HERA RESORT QUY NHON
home_hl_dsc_concept: Inspired by the primitive beauty of Quy Nhon's white stone combined with modern, minimalist yet extremely luxurious architectural style.
